summary: Lead accepts M5-MANUAL-NODE-BATTLE-DECISION-001 after systems_architect and qa_reviewer both returned ACCEPT on the process-only DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE decision. The accepted decision keeps manual node battle out of M5 and the 1.0 mainline, authorizes no implementation task and no blocking spike or research task for M5/M6/M7/M8, preserves automatic and abstract campaign battle systems, reconciles the status audit ledger minimally, and leaves M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 as the next separate gate only after this task enters main and is closed.

tests_run.result: No whitespace errors in the decision/review coordination diff.
M5-MANUAL-NODE-BATTLE-DECISION-001 is REVIEW before lead acceptance; M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 is DRAFT; no M6/M7/M8 task rows exist.
No ready task emitted while the manual node battle decision remains in REVIEW.
Manual decision task schema is valid.
M5 Exit Human Gate task schema is valid and remains DRAFT.
After lead acceptance, M5-MANUAL-NODE-BATTLE-DECISION-001 is ACCEPTED and M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 remains DRAFT.
After lead acceptance, taskctl lists M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 as the next dependency-ready gate. Lead must not start it until this accepted decision enters main and is closed.

decisions: ACCEPT: Manual node battle is not in M5 and not in the 1.0 mainline.
ACCEPT: No manual node battle implementation task, blocking spike, or blocking research task is authorized for M5, M6, M7, or M8.
ACCEPT: Existing automatic/abstract battle, campaign preparation, march, supply, siege, withdrawal, postwar governance, and campaign AI systems remain preserved.
ACCEPT: M5 Exit remains a separate Human Gate; this decision does not pass M5 or start M6.
risks: M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 appears in taskctl ready after lead ACCEPTED because taskctl treats ACCEPTED dependencies as satisfied; it must not actually start until this accepted decision is integrated and M5-MANUAL-NODE-BATTLE-DECISION-001 is closed on main.

docs/11-roadmap.md still contains older M6 wording about deciding whether to implement manual battle; the later accepted decision and PROJECT_STATUS override current operational routing for the 1.0 task graph.
requested_action: Create and merge the process-only PR. After it enters main, close M5-MANUAL-NODE-BATTLE-DECISION-001 and then make M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 the next separate gate.
